content: We can reframe a single general reinforcement learning agent's developmental trajectory into an implicit three-stage progressive structure that aligns with three-stage progressive reinforcement learning: first, the agent expands its episodic memory through curiosity-driven random exploration (Stage 1), then it prunes and consolidates noisy exploratory memories into reusable transition models via hybrid planning (Stage 2), and finally it fine-tunes its policy for target downstream tasks via active learning (Stage 3).
